title: medicago italica var. tornata
intro: Medicago italica var. tornata, also known as Italian or hainault clover, is a perennial legume plant that belongs to the Fabaceae family. It is rich in isoflavones and saponins, which have been traditionally used for their medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant has been used to treat various health conditions, such as menopausal symptoms, cardiovascular disease, and digestive issues, due to its potential to reduce estrogen levels, lower cholesterol, and improve gut health. Herbal preparations of Medicago italica var. tornata include tea, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
